subtitle.en: native DsRed is a tetramer; Shaner 2004 directed-evolved it through dimers to monomeric mCherry — a single-spot labelling protein
subtitle.ko: DsRed는 4합체 — Shaner(2004)가 directed evolution으로 단량체 mCherry 달성

description.en: DsRed / mRFP / mCherry comparison: oligomer state and brightness. mCherry is monomeric + bright — modern standard RFP.
description.ko: DsRed/mRFP/mCherry 비교 — 올리고머 상태와 밝기. mCherry가 단량체 + 밝음.
